As a HR operator
I want directory, onboarding, inventory, and assignment pages
So that people and device lifecycle work lives in one module

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The HR module exposes directory, onboarding, inventory, and assignments views.
- [ ] Each view is wired into the HR shell and shared data-loading layer.
